scenes.narration: Ganesh Chaturthi 2026. The biggest Hindu festival of the year. Here's everything you need to know  –  the exact date, muhurta, and puja timing.

Ganesh Chaturthi falls on Thursday, August 20th, 2026. The festival begins with Chaturthi tithi starting on August 19th evening, and the puja is performed on the 20th during Madhyahna  –  the midday period considered most auspicious for Ganesha worship.
scenes.stockQuery: hindu puja ceremony incense flowers offering

scenes.narration: The Sthapana muhurta  –  the exact time to install the Ganesh idol  –  falls during the midday window. Avoid Rahu Kaal and the early morning Bhadra period. The Chaturthi tithi runs until the next morning, giving you a generous window for puja.
scenes.stockQuery: ganesh statue gold ornate close up

scenes.narration: Anant Chaturdashi  –  the visarjan day  –  falls on Monday, August 31st. This is when Lord Ganesha is immersed after 10 days of celebration. The ideal visarjan time is during the afternoon, after the Uttara Puja.
scenes.stockQuery: ganesh visarjan immersion water festival procession

scenes.narration: One important rule  –  do not look at the Moon on Chaturthi night. This is the Chandra Dosha tradition. If you accidentally see the Moon, chant the Syamantaka Mani story to remove the dosha.
scenes.stockQuery: full moon night sky clouds dark
scenes.textOverlay: Do NOT look at the Moon

textTiming.text: Do NOT look at the Moon

scenes.narration: Modak, durva grass, red flowers, and 21 blades of grass. These are the five essentials for Ganesh puja. The mantra: Om Gan Ganapataye Namaha. Chant 108 times for maximum blessing.
scenes.stockQuery: modak indian sweet traditional offering plate

scenes.narration: Save this for August. Follow Dekho Panchang for the exact muhurta timing based on your city. Ganpati Bappa Morya!
scenes.stockQuery: ganesh festival crowd celebration lights evening
